title: AWS S3 Public Access Risk
summary: Applied L2 LAB teaching how S3 public access risk emerges from bucket policy, Block Public Access settings, ACL history, identity permissions, resource policies, and organization guardrails.
objectives: Explain what makes S3 access public
Differentiate bucket policies, ACLs, and Block Public Access settings
Reason about identity-side and resource-side authorization
Understand how explicit deny and organization guardrails affect S3 exposure
Explain why public access is an exposure scenario, not a single setting
Prepare learners for applied cloud risk analysis and Principal LAB reasoning
